variables.notes: No explicit depreciation or amortisation row related to COGS appears in the operating section above financial lines. Relative to selected COGS row 'Cost of Revenues/COGS', assume D&A is already embedded; add nothing separately.

No explicit depreciation or amortisation row related to SG&A, admin, sales, or R&D appears in the operating section above financial lines. Relative to selected XSGA row 'Sales costs and administrative expenses', assume D&A is already embedded; add nothing separately.
